name: doc
description: Rendered markdown document with reading typography, optional table of contents, and live reload

content_url.description: URL of the raw markdown file; supplied implicitly by the engine at render time

title.description: Optional slim header title; hidden when empty

toc.description: Show a sticky sidebar listing h1-h3 with anchor links (hidden below 900px viewports)

width.description: Reading measure: narrow (55ch), default (72ch), or wide (95ch)
